title: spilanthes filicaulis
intro: Spilanthes filicaulis, also known as the American toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial infections. The leaves and flowers of the Spilanthes filicaulis plant contain compounds that have been shown to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as relief from toothaches, sore throats, and gum inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to support oral health and overall well-being.
